summary: Backend testing completed for Multi-Department Support feature. All 10 tests passed. The feature allows department heads to manage multiple departments within the same faculty.

minor.issue: When creating user with department_ids, department_id is not auto-set to first element (unlike PUT /api/users which does set it). Minor inconsistency - doesn't affect functionality.

action_items: Optional: In POST /api/users endpoint, consider setting department_id = department_ids[0] for backward compatibility (same logic as in PUT /api/users)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ UserUpdate model correctly supports department_ids as Optional[List[str]]
✓ UserResponse model correctly includes department_name and department_names fields
✓ get_user_scope_filter function properly handles multiple department_ids using $in MongoDB query
✓ GET /api/users correctly returns department_names array for users with multiple departments
✓ PUT /api/users correctly updates department_ids and sets department_id for backward compatibility
seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up automatically by test suite
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-department support is fully functional. User 'Seaaad' (username: Saeed) has 2 departments assigned: الشريعة والقانون (698e500997fef774e66e93a8) and الدراسات الإسلامية (698e501d97fef774e66e93a9). Tests cover: GET users with department_ids/department_names, POST users with multiple departments, PUT users to add/remove departments, data filtering logic verification.

1_get_users_department_ids.details: Response includes department_ids field for all users

2_get_users_department_names.details: Users with multiple departments have department_names array and combined department_name (joined by |)

3_existing_multi_dept_user.details: User Seaaad verified with 2 departments: الشريعة والقانون | الدراسات الإسلامية

4_create_user_multi_dept.details: Created user with multiple department_ids successfully

5_update_user_multi_dept.details: Updated user from 1 to 2 departments, verified persistence

6_remove_departments.details: Removed departments from user, including clearing all departments

7_scope_filter_logic.details: get_user_scope_filter correctly uses $in query for multiple departments

api_responses_verified.GET /api/users: Returns department_ids, department_name, department_names for each user
api_responses_verified.POST /api/users: Accepts department_ids array, returns created user with department_ids
api_responses_verified.PUT /api/users/{id}: Accepts department_ids array, sets department_id to first element, returns updated user
